title: The 10-Minute SaaS Financial Model
subtitle: Stop Guessing Your Runway. Start Winning Your Pitch.
descriptionBody: "How much cash do we have left?" "What is our CAC Payback if we hire two devs?" If these questions keep you up at night, you are not alone. Most founders either avoid their financials entirely or lose hours to spreadsheets that do not add up. This model solves both problems at once — a clean, investor-ready SaaS financial model you can build in an afternoon, not a week.
section1Body: A battle-tested, "clean-code" version of the exact spreadsheets used by venture-backed startups to track growth, burn, and valuation.

features.name: The Vibe Check Dashboard
features.desc: One-page summary of MRR, ARR, LTV/CAC, and Runway — the four numbers VCs always ask about first.

features.name: The Growth Engine
features.desc: No magic numbers. Input your pricing and churn; watch your revenue waterfall build itself.

features.name: The Crystal Ball
features.desc: Toggle one input cell. See your 3-year valuation update instantly — no manual recalculation.

features.name: The Hiring Planner
features.desc: Map out your team growth month by month. Know exactly when you hit your burn threshold.

features.name: The Valuation Engine
features.desc: ARR Multiples + DCF. Both methods, so you can answer "what are we worth?" either way.

whyPoints.title: Save 20+ Hours
whyPoints.desc: Skip the late-night formula debugging. This model is built and sanity-checked — plug in your numbers and present.

whyPoints.title: No More Excel Panic
whyPoints.desc: Every cell is linked, protected, and traceable. No orphan formulas, no mystery numbers.

whyPoints.title: Look Like a Pro on Day One
whyPoints.desc: Send an investor a structured model on your first call. Not a messy CSV they have to reverse-engineer.

footerResultDetails: Total clarity on your startup's future.
whatYouGet: Investor-ready SaaS financial model (fully unlocked Excel)
Automatic ARR / MRR / CAC Payback dashboards
Fully editable — plug in your own numbers
whoThisIsFor: SaaS founders building their first financial model for a seed pitch
Indie hackers who need one clean model instead of ten conflicting spreadsheets
Startup operators preparing board slides or investor updates
MBA/VC analysts who need a fast SaaS starter template

faq.q: Is this Excel or Google Sheets?
faq.a: The model works in Excel and can be imported into Google Sheets.
Yes, the model is fully editable.
Yes, one purchase gives you lifetime access.

faq.q: Is this suitable for early-stage startups?
faq.a: Yes, it is designed for founders building SaaS financial projections.
